-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://veriskpropertyestimatingsolutions.my.site.com/s/article/2622)[Privacy Policy](https://www.verisk.com/privacy-policies/xactware-privacy-notice/)[Support](https://veriskpropertyestimatingsolutions.my.site.com/s/)
    

Connect Claude to Verisk's XactRestore so restoration and remodeling professionals can build and refine estimates by simply describing the work that needs to be done. Powered by Xactware's pricing and material data, Claude can create rooms, add and adjust line items, apply Quick Estimates, and surface pricing details inside trusted XactRestore workflows, while keeping contractors in control of every change. Make estimating faster, more intuitive, and easier to review so teams spend less time wrestling with software and more time helping homeowners.

You can use Verisk XactRestore to:

**Generate Rebuild Estimates with Upgrade Options:**  
"Create a full kitchen rebuild estimate after water damage with standard, high, and premium options"

**Generate Roofing Estimates from Basic Inputs:**  
"Create a roofing estimate for a 25 square architectural shingle roof with moderate pitch"

**Modify Estimates with Real-Time Pricing:**  
"What does it cost to add a premium pot filler above the stove in this kitchen remodel?"
